svg.title: An equal mix of the two lowest states: probability sloshes while energy stays constant
svg.desc: Top: the probability density of the equal mix of the two lowest states at three times in one period. At t=0 the density is heaped on the left, at t=T/2 on the right, at t=T/4 it is symmetric; t=3T/4 retraces the T/4 curve. Bottom left: the average position oscillates between 0.32L and 0.68L. Bottom right: the average energy is constant at about 0.94 eV.

text.tspan: Probability sloshes, energy stays put: the mix (ψ
